architectureFlows.title: Request Lifecycle in a Full-stack App
architectureFlows.tip: While answering architecture questions, narrate this flow from left to right and mention one failure mode in each step.

architectureFlows.title: Scalable Notification Pipeline
architectureFlows.tip: Impress interviewers by explaining retry policy, dead-letter queue, and idempotent message keys.

architectureFlows.title: Todo App Evolution Plan
architectureFlows.tip: Show progression from beginner project to production-grade system to demonstrate growth mindset.

learningPath: Phase 1 (Weeks 1-4): JavaScript + Node basics, solve 2 questions/day and handwrite answers.
Phase 2 (Weeks 5-8): Build mini APIs and database schemas, solve 3 mixed questions/day.
Phase 3 (Weeks 9-12): Full-stack Todo app with auth, tests, CI/CD, and architecture reviews.
Phase 4 (Ongoing): Mock interviews, whiteboard flows, timed coding rounds, and postmortems.
impressInterviewerChecklist: Clarify requirements before coding and restate assumptions.
Start with a simple version, then improve iteratively.
Name edge cases proactively (auth, validation, race conditions).
Add tests and explain why each test protects business value.
Discuss trade-offs (speed vs maintainability vs cost).
Explain monitoring, logs, and rollback plan for production.
